Five specific implementation gaps confirmed between docs and code for omp-noesis v1.0: (1) retainToOmp defined in NoesisRuntime interface but never wired in createRuntime(); (2) context-hook caches _capability module-scope for session lifetime, never refreshed until process restart; (3) _INDEX.md documented at .obsidian/noesis/_INDEX.md but no runtime code generates it — init writes static Noesis Index.md at project root with stale references; (4) composite-vault-store.ts deleted in v0.2 but ARCHITECTURE.md and OBSIDIAN_CONTRACT.md still reference it; (5) preserveData key mismatch: compaction-hook uses "omp-noesis" but ARCHITECTURE.md documents "noesis"
